Meaning.En: A statistical measure of the dispersion of a set of data points around their mean value.
Meaning.Example: The variance of the test scores was unusually high, indicating inconsistent performance.

Situation.Vi: Một chỉ tiêu thống kê dùng để đo lường mức độ phân tán của dữ liệu.
Situation.En: A key metric in statistical analysis to quantify variability in a dataset.

Meaning.Vi: Sự khác biệt; sự thay đổi
Meaning.En: A difference or deviation, especially one that is not in accordance with a rule, standard, or agreement.
Meaning.Example: Any variance from the approved budget must be justified in writing.

Situation.Vi: Sự chênh lệch trong hợp đồng hoặc quy định.
Situation.En: A formal deviation from a previously agreed-upon plan or specification.
